# Imagegen Batch Log

## Rules

- Record every generated image or edited image used by this art pack.
- Reference images are inspiration only unless explicitly marked as edit targets.
- Review samples and candidates do not become runtime assets automatically.
- Do not copy anything into runtime `assets/` unless a tracking row says `Approved for Game Asset`.

## Status Values

- Draft
- Generated
- Needs Revision
- Rejected
- Approved for Expansion
- Approved for Game Asset
- Godot Ready
- Imported
- Verified
